majors.description: Machine learning, deep learning, and data science students who need CUDA GPU compute, high RAM, and Python ecosystem support.

recommended_min_specs.gpu: NVIDIA RTX (8 GB+ VRAM, CUDA preferred)

majors.description: Software development, algorithms, data structures, web/app development, and system programming students.
Mechanical engineering students running SolidWorks, ANSYS, CATIA, MATLAB, and CFD simulations.
Civil engineering students using AutoCAD, Revit, STAAD Pro, and GIS software for structural and infrastructure design.
Electronics and communication engineering students using EDA tools, FPGA synthesis, and embedded systems development.

recommended_min_specs.gpu: Integrated sufficient; CUDA a bonus for Vivado

majors.description: MBA and management students needing a premium, portable, professional machine for presentations, Excel, and networking.
Marketing, media studies, and business communication students who need vivid displays for content, portability, and long battery.
UI/UX, graphic design, animation, and visual communication students who need color-accurate, high-resolution displays.
